title: N-PAMP Per-Channel Frame-Type Registry
description: Schema for the JSON representation of registries/frame_types_channel.csv: an array of row objects, one per channel-specific frame-type assignment. UNLIKE registries/frame_types_reserved.csv (the flat all-channel view: system frames 0x0001-0x000A, coarse reserved ranges, and the Control-channel handshake), this registry enumerates the FINE-GRAINED per-channel frame-type namespace (core specification section 4.6): a frame_type value carries meaning ONLY on its channel_id, so the SAME numeric frame_type (e.g. 0x0100) legitimately recurs across channels. Uniqueness is therefore the COMPOSITE key (channel_id, frame_type), which JSON Schema cannot assert across rows -- the companion validate-frame-types-channel.py enforces it, and additionally cross-checks every row's go_const against the value in impl/go/<go_file> so the registry and the Go reference implementation stay in lockstep. This schema alone catches wrong-format code points, bad band tokens, malformed names/identifiers, and missing/empty columns. It does NOT accept range tokens: every row is one concrete assignment.

channel_id.description: 16-bit channel identifier, hex-prefixed, exactly 4 hex digits (e.g. 0x0001). MUST resolve to a row in registries/channels.csv (checked by the companion validator).

channel_name.description: Channel name; MUST be non-empty and MUST match the channels.csv name for channel_id (checked by the companion validator).

frame_type.description: 16-bit channel-specific frame type, hex-prefixed, exactly 4 hex digits. A single concrete assignment (no ranges). Unique only in combination with channel_id.

name.description: Canonical UPPER_SNAKE frame-type name from the channel's companion specification section 3 (e.g. MEMORY_CREATE_REQ).

go_const.description: Identifier of the Go reference-implementation constant of type FrameType that declares this frame_type (e.g. FrameMemoryCreateReq). The companion validator reads impl/go/<go_file> and asserts the constant's value equals frame_type.

go_file.description: Base name of the impl/go source file that declares go_const (e.g. memory.go).

band.description: Frame-type namespace band (core specification section 4.6): 'application' for the channel-specific application band 0x0100-0xFFFF, 'companion-extension' for a per-channel extension frame in the reserved companion-extension band 0x0030-0x00FF.

description.description: Human-readable purpose of the frame, drawn from the channel's companion specification section 3; MUST be non-empty.
